y 5 2017 CONTENTS Or-tools Or-tools on the Instructional computers Or-tools -------- Google Optimization Tools (OR-Tools) is a suite of software for solving combinatorial optimization problems. Downloads and documentation can be found

ems. Downloads and documentation can be found at https://developers.google.com/optimization/. Or-tools on the Instructional computers --------------------------------------- The Or-tools are installed on an EECS instructional Linux Ubuntu ser

nstalled on an EECS instructional Linux Ubuntu server called ashby.cs.berkeley.edu in /usr/local/or-tools/. It was installed for CS170 in Spring 2017. Please ask inst@eecs.berkeley.edu if you would like to use the or-tools on another instruc
would like to use the or-tools on another instructional computer. EECS Instructional Support 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
